{{Quote|Good shooting, Norley! Old Tech Sergeant Hooly would be proud of that shot!|Cee Norley, after shooting down an Imperial skimmer|<ref name="Audio">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
[[Tech Sergeant]] '''Hooly''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who served as a training instructor for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Military/Legends|Military]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Hooly was well versed in the use of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]],<ref name="CSWE" /> and was responsible for the training of [[Cee Norley]]. Norley would later recall Hooly's teachings [[Mission to Dorlo|while on]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dorlo]], where she faced off against the forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="RA" /> After destroying an Imperial [[Skimmer/Legends|skimmer]], Norley remarked that Hooly would have been proud of her.<ref name="Audio" /> However, Hooly's prodigy was killed shortly thereafter by an Imperial [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]].<ref name="RA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tech Sergeant Hooly was first mentioned in the [[1998]] novella ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'', which was written by [[William C. Dietz]].<ref name="RA" /> Hooly was also mentioned in the novella's [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|full cast audio adaption]],<ref name="Audio" /> and received an entry in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE" />
